attr.title: Project S.H.M.O.O.P
attr.desc: Project S.H.M.O.O.P is a horizontal shoot-em-up (shmup) that hearkens back to shmups of the 90's. It features 5 levels, 14 bosses, 2 playable ships, and 0 original assets.
attr.inst: Download the Shmoop.rar from https://sinoc.itch.io/shmoop and extract Shmoop.exe into assets folder.
attr.inst_md: Download the `Shmoop.rar` from [Itch.io](https://sinoc.itch.io/shmoop) and extract `Shmoop.exe` into `assets` folder.
